name: memorydetective
description: iOS leak hunting + performance investigation. Reads .memgraph and .trace files, classifies retain cycles against a 36-pattern catalog (SwiftUI / Combine / Concurrency / UIKit / Core Animation / Core Data / SwiftData / Coordinator / RxSwift / Realm). v1.11 adds inspectTrace (single-call orientation for .trace bundles with schemas + row counts + device + suggestedNextCalls per analyzer), diffMemgraphs reference-tree integration (heap-wide class-count deltas surface in actionableReferenceTreeChanges field even when leakCount=0), and CLI human-output abandoned-memory mini-table so terminal users no longer see 'no leaks detected' on leakCount=0 memgraphs that have orphaned AV/KVO instances. v1.10 closed the notelet retro feedback loop with parser fixes + classifier guards + verify-fix-table output. v1.9 added analyzeAbandonedMemory, detectLeaksInXCTest, cleanupTraces, mainThreadViolations. Single-call build + boot + launch with MallocStackLogging fixes the macOS 26.x leaks --outputGraph regression; replayScenario + captureScenarioState close the verify-fix loop. Bridges to Swift source via SourceKit-LSP. 35 MCP tools, 34 catalog resources, 5 investigation prompts.
